name: Black Bean with Peppers & Cumin Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the beans and rinse well.
2. Place the beans in a large pot with the water and bay leaf.
3. Bring to a boil and simmer for 1 to 1 1/2 hours.
4. Drain the beans.
5. In a small bowl, combine salt, vinegar, garlic, cumin, hot pepper sauce, cilantro, and olive oil.
6. Pour over warm beans.
7. Toss well.
8. Add remaining ingredients.
9. Gently toss and garnish with fresh cilantro.
10. Serve at room temperature.
